S

search(E) - Method in class implementations.MyQueue
Returns the 1-based position from the front of this queue where the specified element is located.
search(E) - Method in class implementations.MyStack
Returns the 1-based position from the top of the stack where the specified element is located.
search(E) - Method in interface utilities.QueueADT
Returns the 1-based position from the front of the queue where the specified element is located.
search(E) - Method in interface utilities.StackADT
Returns the 1-based position from the top of the stack where the specified element is located.
set(int, E) - Method in class implementations.MyArrayList
Replaces the element at the specified position with the specified element.
set(int, E) - Method in class implementations.MyDLL
Replaces the element at the specified position with the specified element.
set(int, E) - Method in interface utilities.ListADT
Replaces the element at the specified position in this list with the specified element.
setElement(E) - Method in class implementations.MyDLLNode
Replaces the element stored in this node.
setNext(MyDLLNode<E>) - Method in class implementations.MyDLLNode
Sets the node following this node in the list.
setPrev(MyDLLNode<E>) - Method in class implementations.MyDLLNode
Sets the node preceding this node in the list.
setUp() - Method in class unitTests.ArrayListTest
Initializes a new MyArrayList instance and five Integer instances before each test.
setUp() - Method in class unitTests.DLLTest
Initializes a new MyDLL instance and five Integer instances before each test.
setUp() - Method in class unitTests.QueueTest
Initializes a MyQueue instance and five Integer instances before each test.
setUp() - Method in class unitTests.StackTest
Initializes a MyStack instance and five Integer instances before each test.
size() - Method in class implementations.MyArrayList
Returns the number of elements currently in the list.
size() - Method in class implementations.MyDLL
Returns the number of elements currently in the list.
size() - Method in class implementations.MyQueue
Returns the length of the current queue as an integer value.
size() - Method in class implementations.MyStack
Returns the number of elements currently in this stack.
size() - Method in interface utilities.ListADT
The size method will return the current element count contained in the list.
size() - Method in interface utilities.QueueADT
Returns the number of elements currently in this queue.
size() - Method in interface utilities.StackADT
Returns the number of elements currently in this stack.
StackADT<E> - Interface in utilities
The StackADT interface defines the abstract data type for a stack data structure to be used in CPRG304 at SAIT Polytechnic.
stackOverflow() - Method in class implementations.MyStack
Returns true if the stack is at capacity.
stackOverflow() - Method in interface utilities.StackADT
Returns true if the number of elements in the stack equals its fixed maximum capacity.
StackTest - Class in unitTests
 
StackTest() - Constructor for class unitTests.StackTest
